issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases comprehensively.

scenarios.name: Scheduled cleanup task with Redis storage
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses defineNitroConfig with storage.db driver redis, scheduledTasks cron, and defineTask in server/tasks/cleanup.ts using useStorage("db").getKeys exactly as in the SKILL.md; baseline writes a node-cron script with ioredis and no Nitro primitives.

scenarios.name: Auth middleware that bypasses /api/public
scenarios.rationale: Treatment puts defineEventHandler in server/middleware/auth.ts using getRequestURL/getHeader, sets event.context.user, and throws createError — matching the SKILL pattern; baseline writes generic Express middleware unrelated to Nitro.
